serverUrl.title: Deadbolt server URL
serverUrl.description: Base URL of the team's Deadbolt server, e.g. https://team.deadbolt.app

enrollmentCode.title: Enrollment code
enrollmentCode.description: The team/group enrollment code the device joins with, e.g. NSD-4K9-QX2

deviceName.title: Device name
deviceName.description: Optional label shown in the admin console for this device.
